# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.

Prevent service mesh security.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: "config.istio.io/v1alpha2"
kind: EnvoyFilter
metadata:
  name: enable-admin-interface
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: "*"
  configPatches:
  - applyTo: NETWORK_FILTER
    match:
      context: SIDECAR_INBOUND
      proxy:
        proxyVersion: '^1\.6\.'
    patch:
      operation: INSERT_BEFORE
      value:
        name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        config:
          stat_prefix: ingress_http
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
              - name: local_service
                domains: ["*"]
                routes:
                  - match:
                      prefix: "/"
                    route:
                      cluster: inbound|9080||
          http_filters:
            - name: envoy.router
              config: {}
          listeners:
            - name: listener_0
              address:
                socket_address: { address: 0.0.0.0, port_value: 15000 }
              filter_chains:
                - filters:
                    - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
                      config:
                        stat_prefix: ingress_http
                        route_config:
                          name: local_route
                          virtual_hosts:
                            - name: local_service
                              domains: ["*"]
                              routes:
                                - match:
                                    prefix: "/"
                                  route:
                                    cluster: inbound|9080||
                        http_filters:
                          - name: envoy.router
                            config: {}
                        access_log:
                          - file:
                              path: /dev/stdout
                              format: "%START_TIME% %RESP(X-Envoy-Upstream-Service-Time)%"
  - applyTo: NETWORK_FILTER
    match:
      context: SIDECAR_OUTBOUND
      proxy:
        proxyVersion: '^1\.6\.'
    patch:
      operation: INSERT_BEFORE
      value:
        name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        config:
          stat_prefix: ingress_http
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
              - name: local_service
                domains: ["*"]
                routes:
                  - match:
                      prefix: "/"
                    route:
                      cluster: outbound|9080||
          http_filters:
            - name: envoy.router
              config: {}
          listeners:
            - name: listener_0
              address:
                socket_address: { address: 0.0.0.0, port_value: 15000 }
              filter_chains:
                - filters:
                    - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
                      config:
                        stat_prefix: ingress_http
                        route_config:
                          name: local_route
                          virtual_hosts:
                            - name: local_service
                              domains: ["*"]
                              routes:
                                - match:
                                    prefix: "/"
                                  route:
                                    cluster: outbound|9080||
                        http_filters:
                          - name: envoy.router
                            config: {}
                        access_log:
                          - file:
                              path: /dev/stdout
                              format: "%START_TIME% %RESP(X-Envoy-Upstream-Service-Time)%"
